questions.text: If a train travels 300 km in 4 hours, what is its average speed in km/h?
questions.explanation: Average speed = Total distance / Total time = 300 / 4 = 75 km/h. Always use the formula: Speed = Distance / Time.

questions.text: Find the next number in the series: 2, 6, 18, 54, ___
questions.explanation: Each term is multiplied by 3: 2x3=6, 6x3=18, 18x3=54, 54x3=162. This is a geometric sequence with common ratio 3.

questions.text: A shopkeeper buys an item for 500 ETB and sells it for 650 ETB. What is the profit percentage?
questions.explanation: Profit = 650 - 500 = 150 ETB. Profit % = (Profit / Cost Price) x 100 = (150 / 500) x 100 = 30%.

questions.text: If all Bloops are Razzles and all Razzles are Lazzles, which statement must be true?
options: D) Some Razzles are not Lazzles
questions.explanation: This is a syllogism: Bloops -> Razzles -> Lazzles. Therefore Bloops -> Lazzles (all Bloops are Lazzles). The chain of inclusion is transitive.

questions.text: Two workers can complete a job in 6 days. How many days would it take 3 workers to complete the same job (same rate)?
questions.explanation: Total work = 2 workers x 6 days = 12 worker-days. With 3 workers: 12 / 3 = 4 days. More workers means fewer days (inverse proportion).

questions.text: The word TEACHER is coded as VGCEJGT. What is the code for STUDENT?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by 2 positions in the alphabet. T+2=V, E+2=G, A+2=C, C+2=E, H+2=J, E+2=G, R+2=T. Applying same: S+2=U, T+2=V, U+2=W, D+2=F, E+2=G, N+2=P, T+2=V = UVWFGPV.
Percentage = (Part / Whole) x 100 = (20 / 80) x 100 = 25%. So 20 is 25% of 80.

questions.text: In a class of 40 students, 60% are girls. How many boys are in the class?
questions.explanation: Girls = 60% of 40 = 24. Boys = 40 - 24 = 16. Alternatively: boys = 40% of 40 = 16.
3, 5, 7, 11 are all prime numbers. 9 is NOT prime (9 = 3 x 3). Therefore 9 is the odd one out.

questions.text: A rectangle has a length of 12 cm and a width of 5 cm. What is the length of its diagonal?
questions.explanation: Using the Pythagorean theorem: diagonal^2 = length^2 + width^2 = 12^2 + 5^2 = 144 + 25 = 169. Diagonal = sqrt(169) = 13 cm.
